reasoning_chain: The unpaved dirt road with no markings and simple corrugated metal fencing is typical of rural Ethiopian villages.
Utility poles with overhead wires and the style of single-story whitewashed houses with brick pillars are common in lowland Ethiopia.
Vegetation includes drought-tolerant trees and shrubs consistent with the Ethiopian highland or semi-arid climate.
